properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v1 v2 v5 v6 v7 v1 v2 v5 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When the light comes Darkness runs away, And only what lives In the light can stay,

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When the light comes Nothing left to hide So /:come out of the darkness And turn on the light. :/

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There's a place in my heart Only I have seen It's filled with my failures And broken dreams

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: But there's nothing That's broken That You can't mend Let this be the day That I let You in

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Turn on the light Turn on the light Turn on the light Turn on the light

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There's a place in Your heart Only You have seen It's filled with compassion For someone like me

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Your love's not afraid Of the mess I've been Help me open the door And let You in

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I throw open the door I fall to my knees I lay down my pride No secrets to keep

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: The light of Your love Is shining on me The goodness of God Is setting me free
